summary: GRACE >= 158 flags 331 patients (21.7%) with sensitivity 58.3% and specificity 81.3%. RF at Youden threshold flags 418 patients (27.4%) with sensitivity 75.7% and specificity 76.5%. RF detects 20 more deaths than GRACE while flagging +87 fewer patients. RF AUC (0.821) is significantly higher than GRACE AUC (0.766).
